title: AgentIdentityRegistry
description: Schema for .github/ai-state/agent-identity-registry.json — the agent identity registry projection that assigns stable agentId, workerClass, owner, permissions, trust score, and accountability metadata to every worker. See docs/ai-native/agent-identity-registry-schema.md for field-level documentation.

markerVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this registry projection was captured or last updated.

agents.description: Registered agent entries. Each key is an agentId.

agentId.description: Stable agent identifier in kebab-case (e.g. 'worker-runtime-feature-001', 'agent-telemetry-governance'). Must be unique within the registry.

workerClass.description: Worker class this agent belongs to. Determines file boundaries and layer assignment per worker-permissions.json.

owner.description: Human or team responsible for this agent (e.g. 'taoyu', 'platform-team'). Used for escalation routing.

allowedFileGlobs.description: File glob patterns this agent is permitted to modify. Derived from worker class boundary.

maxConcurrentTasks.description: Maximum number of tasks this agent may execute concurrently.

canSelfApprove.description: Whether this agent may self-approve its own outputs. Must be false for all workers — enforced by seed constitution.

current.description: Current trust score in [0.0, 1.0]. Updated by the state reconciler after each task completion or failure.

defaultBaseline.description: Baseline trust score from worker-trust.json for this agent's workerClass. Used to reset trust after long idle periods.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when trust score was last updated.

registeredAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this agent was first registered.

status.description: Current agent status. active = currently dispatched, idle = available for dispatch, suspended = blocked by policy or trust, retired = permanently decommissioned.

totalTasksCompleted.description: Total number of tasks this agent has completed successfully.

totalTasksFailed.description: Total number of tasks this agent has failed.

lastTaskAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the agent's last completed or failed task.

lastFailureReason.description: Reason for the agent's most recent failure, if any.

consecutiveFailures.description: Number of consecutive task failures. Reset to 0 on success. Used by scheduling rules to auto-suspend agents.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about this agent (e.g. why it was suspended, special capabilities).
